",n(r.p,{children:"Gatsby sites are incredibly fast because they are static. Static files are served directly to users without the need for server-side processing. This makes Gatsby sites faster than many traditional websites, even those with caching."}),"

",n(r.p,{children:"Gatsby is a powerful static site generator that uses GraphQL for data fetching, React for building user interfaces, and a robust plugin system for added functionality. title: How AI is Transforming The World? 🌍
description: Explore the transformative power of Artificial Intelligence in our rapidly evolving world. From reshaping industries to enhancing education and transcending
body:
const{Fragment:e,jsx:n,jsxs:i}=arguments[0];function _createMdxContent(a){const t={a:"a",h3:"h3",p:"p",...a.components};return i(e,{children:[n(t.h3,{id:"introduction",children:n(t.a,{className:"subheading-anchor","aria-label":"Link to section",href:"#introduction",children:"Introduction"})}),"
",n(t.p,{children:"In today's rapidly evolving technological world, Artificial Intelligence has captivated our potential and imagination. This amazing technology is redefining the boundaries of human achievement, propelling us into an era of unprecedented innovation and limitless opportunities."}),"
",n(t.p,{children:"From generating lifelike media instantaneously to revolutionizing education and transforming industries, AI's influence is extensive and holds the potential to reshape our lifestyles, interactions, and work environments."}),"
",n(t.h3,{id:"ai-in-visual-arts",children:n(t.a,{className:"subheading-anchor","aria-label":"Link to section",href:"#ai-in-visual-arts",children:"AI in Visual Arts"})}),"
",n(t.p,{children:"Traditionally, crafting realistic visuals necessitated hours of labor-intensive effort and brainstorming. However, AI has emerged as a game-changer, capable of producing remarkably authentic photos and videos within seconds."}),"
",n(t.p,{children:"This has fueled the rapid evolution of digital artistry, opening up new horizons for creative expression and making significant contributions to fields like entertainment and advertising."}),"
",n(t.h3,{id:"cross-cultural-communication-with-ai",children:n(t.a,{className:"subheading-anchor","aria-label":"Link to section",href:"#cross-cultural-communication-with-ai",children:"Cross-Cultural Communication with AI"})}),"
",n(t.p,{children:"AI is also transcending language barriers by facilitating automatic translation of spoken content across different languages, fostering cross-cultural communication. Its applications range from providing subtitles to instantly transcribing voice-overs, bridging linguistic gaps, and making content more accessible to a global audience."}),"
",n(t.h3,{id:"ai-in-education",children:n(t.a,{className:"subheading-anchor","aria-label":"Link to section",href:"#ai-in-education",children:"AI in Education"})}),"
",n(t.p,{children:"As we navigate the digital age, AI is assuming a pivotal role in education, serving as an invaluable tool to enhance learning experiences. Tailoring educational approaches to cater to individual learning styles and preferences, AI is redefining the conventional classroom setting. By harnessing extensive data analysis, AI personalizes learning materials, augmenting comprehension, and engagement."}),"
",n(t.p,{children:"This transition towards personalized education equips students with the adaptable skills needed to flourish in a rapidly changing world."}),"
",n(t.h3,{id:"ais-impact-on-industries",children:n(t.a,{className:"subheading-anchor","aria-label":"Link to section",href:"#ais-impact-on-industries",children:"AI's Impact on Industries"})}),"
",n(t.p,{children:"AI's transformative power isn't confined to education alone; it's altering the landscape of various industries. Industries are experiencing revamped operations, improved efficiency, enhanced customer interactions, and a culture of innovation catalyzed by AI. The travel sector, for instance, is witnessing a revolution in customer engagement through AI-driven personalized recommendations and streamlined booking processes."}),"
",n(t.p,{children:"This shift showcases how AI is revolutionizing sectors that prioritize customer experiences."}),"
",n(t.h3,{id:"job-opportunities-and-career-growth",children:n(t.a,{className:"subheading-anchor","aria-label":"Link to section",href:"#job-opportunities-and-career-growth",children:"Job Opportunities and Career Growth"})}),"
",n(t.p,{children:"While concerns about job displacement persist, AI is simultaneously forging new employment prospects and avenues for career growth. The synergy between human creativity and AI capabilities is giving rise to novel job categories and opportunities."}),"
",n(t.p,{children:"Those adept at leveraging AI's potential are poised to shape the future, driving productivity and innovation across diverse sectors."}),"
",n(t.h3,{id:"ais-contribution-to-addressing-challenges",children:n(t.a,{className:"subheading-anchor","aria-label":"Link to section",href:"#ais-contribution-to-addressing-challenges",children:"AI's Contribution to Addressing Challenges"})}),"
",n(t.p,{children:"Beyond its economic and creative impact, AI is making significant strides in addressing humanity's most pressing challenges. From healthcare diagnostics to environmental modeling, AI's analytical prowess is accelerating breakthroughs in crucial domains."}),"
",n(t.p,{children:"Its capacity to rapidly and accurately process voluminous datasets holds the potential to revolutionize medical research, redefining approaches to disease prevention and treatment."}),"
",n(t.h3,{id:"ethical-considerations-in-ai",children:n(t.a,{className:"subheading-anchor","aria-label":"Link to section",href:"#ethical-considerations-in-ai",children:"Ethical Considerations in AI"})}),"
",n(t.p,{children:"As AI continues to integrate into our daily lives, ethical considerations take center stage. Responsible AI development and deployment are paramount to ensuring technology serves societal interests. The establishment of comprehensive guidelines and safeguards is crucial to prevent misuse and guarantee equitable access to AI's advantages."}),"
",n(t.h3,{id:"conclusion",children:n(t.a,{className:"subheading-anchor","aria-label":"Link to section",href:"#conclusion",children:"Conclusion"})}),"
",n(t.p,{children:"The rise of AI marks a pivotal juncture in human history, propelling us into an era of profound transformation. As an ambitious engineering student fueled by exploration and innovation, you stand on the precipice of this revolution."}),"
",n(t.p,{children:"Embracing AI's potential while remaining vigilant about ethical considerations empowers you to shape a future where technology seamlessly enhances human capabilities. With AI as our ally, we embark on a journey where creativity, ingenuity, and progress converge, forging a path toward a brighter, more interconnected world."})]})}return{default:function(e={}){const{wrapper:i}=e.components||{};return i?n(i,{...e,children:n(_createMdxContent,{...e})}):_createMdxContent(e)}};

title: Kubernetes vs Docker: A Beginner's Guide
description: Explore the differences between Docker and Kubernetes, their key features, use cases, and when to choose each for container orchestration
body:
const{Fragment:e,jsx:n,jsxs:r}=arguments[0];function _createMdxContent(i){const a={a:"a",h2:"h2",h3:"h3",img:"img",li:"li",p:"p",strong:"strong",ul:"ul",...i.components};return r(e,{children:[n(a.p,{children:"Docker and Kubernetes are two essential tools often used in conversations about containerization and orchestration. This blog will break down the roles of Docker and Kubernetes, explain how they interact, and help you understand when to use each."}),"
",n(a.h2,{id:"what-is-docker",children:n(a.a,{className:"subheading-anchor","aria-label":"Link to section",href:"#what-is-docker",children:"What is Docker?"})}),"
",n(a.p,{children:"Docker is a commercial platform that simplifies the process of building, deploying, and running applications using containers. Containers are lightweight, portable, and consistent environments that contain everything needed to run a piece of software, including the code, runtime, system tools, libraries, and settings."}),"
",n(a.p,{children:n(a.img,{src:"https://media.licdn.com/dms/image/D5612AQGeEHapUptoxw/article-cover_image-shrink_600_2000/0/1684079864237?e=2147483647&v=beta&t=UUUAS5PPyisf3YVxC_VFidjxwFeTZwfpb1y4dH0G5xs",alt:"What is Docker? How to create a Docker image and execute an application  within a container ?"})}),"
",n(a.h3,{id:"key-features-of-docker",children:n(a.a,{className:"subheading-anchor","aria-label":"Link to section",href:"#key-features-of-docker",children:"Key Features of Docker"})}),"
",r(a.ul,{children:["
",r(a.li,{children:[n(a.strong,{children:"Client-Server Architecture:"})," Docker uses a client-server architecture where the Docker client communicates with the Docker daemon to build, run, and manage containers."]}),"
",r(a.li,{children:[n(a.strong,{children:"Dockerfile:"})," Developers create Docker images by writing a Dockerfile, which contains a set of instructions on how to build the container."]}),"
",r(a.li,{children:[n(a.strong,{children:"Ease of Use:"})," Docker provides a simple way to package applications, making sharing and deploying software easier."]}),"
"]}),"
",n(a.h2,{id:"what-is-kubernetes",children:n(a.a,{className:"subheading-anchor","aria-label":"Link to section",href:"#what-is-kubernetes",children:"What is Kubernetes?"})}),"
",n(a.p,{children:"Kubernetes (often referred to as K8s), is an open-source platform designed to automate the deployment, scaling, and management of containerized applications. Originally developed by Google, Kubernetes has become the industry standard for container orchestration."}),"
",n(a.p,{children:n(a.img,{src:"https://miro.medium.com/v2/resize:fit:1200/0*0upfXtjqscQ5NQfN.png",alt:"Exploring the Kubernetes Architecture: A Foundation for Modern Application  Deployment | by Kavishka Fernando | Medium"})}),"
",n(a.h3,{id:"key-features-of-kubernetes",children:n(a.a,{className:"subheading-anchor","aria-label":"Link to section",href:"#key-features-of-kubernetes",children:"Key Features of Kubernetes"})}),"
",r(a.ul,{children:["
",r(a.li,{children:[n(a.strong,{children:"Orchestration:"})," Kubernetes can manage clusters of machines and schedule containers to run on those machines based on available resources."]}),"
",r(a.li,{children:[n(a.strong,{children:"Pods:"})," Containers are grouped into units called pods, which are the smallest deployable units in Kubernetes. A pod can contain one or more containers that share resources."]}),"
",r(a.li,{children:[n(a.strong,{children:"Service Discovery and Load Balancing:"})," Kubernetes automatically manages service discovery and load balancing within the cluster."]}),"
",r(a.li,{children:[n(a.strong,{children:"Automated Rollouts and Rollbacks:"})," Kubernetes can automatically roll out updates and roll back changes if something goes wrong."]}),"
",r(a.li,{children:[n(a.strong,{children:"Configuration Management:"})," Kubernetes helps manage configuration and secrets, ensuring that your applications are properly configured."]}),"
"]}),"
",n(a.h2,{id:"comparing-kubernetes-and-docker",children:n(a.a,{className:"subheading-anchor","aria-label":"Link to section",href:"#comparing-kubernetes-and-docker",children:"Comparing Kubernetes and Docker"})}),"
",n(a.p,{children:n(a.img,{src:"https://cdn.hashnode.com/res/hashnode/image/upload/v1718608556461/a2d30e00-9002-4549-9cb4-76cd808f66ae.png",alt:""})}),"
",n(a.h3,{id:"use-cases-for-docker",children:n(a.a,{className:"subheading-anchor","aria-label":"Link to section",href:"#use-cases-for-docker",children:"Use Cases for Docker"})}),"
",r(a.ul,{children:["
",r(a.li,{children:[n(a.strong,{children:"Development and Testing:"})," Docker is perfect for creating consistent development and testing environments."]}),"
",r(a.li,{children:[n(a.strong,{children:"Simple Deployments:"})," Docker works well for small-scale deployments where container orchestration is not a primary concern."]}),"
",r(a.li,{children:[n(a.strong,{children:"CI/CD Pipelines:"})," Docker integrates seamlessly with continuous integration and continuous deployment (CI/CD) pipelines."]}),"
"]}),"
",n(a.h3,{id:"use-cases-for-kubernetes",children:n(a.a,{className:"subheading-anchor","aria-label":"Link to section",href:"#use-cases-for-kubernetes",children:"Use Cases for Kubernetes"})}),"
",r(a.ul,{children:["
",r(a.li,{children:[n(a.strong,{children:"Large-Scale Deployments:"})," Kubernetes is designed to handle complex, large-scale deployments across multiple servers."]}),"
",r(a.li,{children:[n(a.strong,{children:"Cloud-Native Applications:"})," Kubernetes is ideal for applications that need to run in cloud environments, with support for auto-scaling and multi-cloud deployments."]}),"
",r(a.li,{children:[n(a.strong,{children:"Microservices Architectures:"})," Kubernetes excels in managing microservices architectures, where each service is deployed in its own container and scaled independently."]}),"
",r(a.li,{children:[n(a.strong,{children:"Managed Services:"})," All major cloud providers offer managed Kubernetes services, reducing the operational burden of maintaining the infrastructure."]}),"
"]}),"
",n(a.h2,{id:"choosing-between-docker-swarm-and-kubernetes",children:n(a.a,{className:"subheading-anchor","aria-label":"Link to section",href:"#choosing-between-docker-swarm-and-kubernetes",children:"Choosing Between Docker Swarm and Kubernetes"})}),"
",n(a.p,{children:"When deciding whether to use Docker Swarm or Kubernetes, consider the following:"}),"
",n(a.h3,{id:"docker-swarm",children:n(a.a,{className:"subheading-anchor","aria-label":"Link to section",href:"#docker-swarm",children:"Docker Swarm"})}),"

",n(a.h3,{id:"the-time-investment",children:n(a.a,{className:"subheading-anchor","aria-label":"Link to section",href:"#the-time-investment",children:"The Time Investment"})}),"

In comparison, sports like hockey or football offer shorter matches that conclude within an hour or so, creating a discrepancy in the value of time spent."]}),"
",n(a.p,{children:n(a.img,{src:"https://www.livemint.com/lm-img/img/2023/09/11/1600x900/india_vs_pakistan_1694406912486_1694406912717.jpg",alt:""})}),"
",n(a.p,{children:"For example, an India-Pakistan match in the Asia Cup on September 12, 2023, was delayed by a whole day due to rain, effectively consuming two days of the country's attention and energy. This emphasizes the excessive focus on a rivalry that has been perpetuated for far too long."}),"
",n(a.h3,{id:"the-impact-on-other-sports",children:n(a.a,{className:"subheading-anchor","aria-label":"Link to section",href:"#the-impact-on-other-sports",children:"The Impact on Other Sports"})}),"
",n(a.p,{children:n(a.img,{src:"https://thebridge.in/h-upload/2021/07/31/12581-india-medal.jfif",alt:""})}),"
",n(a.p,{children:"India is a country with a population of over 1.4 billion. Despite this, our performance at the Olympics is disheartening. Our unwavering focus on cricket is hindering the growth of other sports. Smaller nations consistently outshine us in terms of gold medal count. Diversifying our sporting interests could help nurture talent across various disciplines, leading to better performance on the global stage."}),"
",n(a.h3,{id:"physical-engagement-and-player-dynamics",children:n(a.a,{className:"subheading-anchor","aria-label":"Link to section",href:"#physical-engagement-and-player-dynamics",children:"Physical Engagement and Player Dynamics"})}),"
",n(a.p,{children:"From a player's perspective, cricket lacks the constant movement and engagement found in other outdoor sports. With only two players batting at a time and fielders maintaining static positions, the game raises concerns about whether we are truly maximizing our physical potential by dedicating our time and energy to cricket."}),"
",n(a.h3,{id:"gender-disparities-in-cricket",children:n(a.a,{className:"subheading-anchor","aria-label":"Link to section",href:"#gender-disparities-in-cricket",children:"Gender Disparities in Cricket"})}),"
",i(a.p,{children:["Cricket's dominance in India extends predominantly to the men's team. The neglect of the ",n(a.a,{href:"https://www.livemint.com/Sports/t9kjKI4UdY4Q9IyOAKCWsJ/Indian-mens-or-womens-cricket-teamwhich-is-better.html",target:"_blank",rel:"nofollow",children:"women's team"})," is disappointing. They lack the viewership, sponsorship, pay, reputation, and influence enjoyed by their male counterparts. This disparity highlights the broader issue of gender inequality in sports."]}),"
",n(a.h3,{id:"colonial-legacy",children:n(a.a,{className:"subheading-anchor","aria-label":"Link to section",href:"#colonial-legacy",children:"Colonial Legacy"})}),"
",n(a.p,{children:n(a.img,{src:"https://c.files.bbci.co.uk/12124/production/_107402047_teamindia-1911-cci-collection.jpg",alt:"How the British forged the first Indian cricket team"})}),"
",n(a.p,{children:"The elimination of cricket as the primary sport of the country is an essential step in the process of removing colonial marks. How can we rename monuments and roads named after colonizers while simultaneously embracing their sporting legacy?"}),"
",n(a.h3,{id:"personal-reflection",children:n(a.a,{className:"subheading-anchor","aria-label":"Link to section",href:"#personal-reflection",children:"Personal Reflection"})}),"
",n(a.p,{children:"As a kid, I was always advised not to watch cricket by my elders. While the players' bank accounts swell, the watchers, who form the backbone of the sport, remain largely unchanged. Their lives are untouched by the glamour and wealth that surrounds the game they love."}),"
",n(a.h3,{id:"real-issues-facing-india",children:n(a.a,{className:"subheading-anchor","aria-label":"Link to section",href:"#real-issues-facing-india",children:"Real Issues Facing India"})}),"
",n(a.p,{children:'The real problems in India are socio-economic—massive poverty, massive unemployment, large-scale malnutrition, almost total absence of healthcare and good education for the poorer sections of our population, high rates of farmers' suicides, and discrimination against women, minorities, and Dalits. The Roman Emperors used to say, "If you cannot give the people bread, give them circuses." The Indian establishment seems to say, "If you cannot give the people bread, give them cricket, Bollywood, the media, religion, astrology, etc."'}),"
",n(a.p,{children:n(a.img,{src:"https://www.worldbank.org/content/dam/photos/780x439/2016/may-4/in-povertyinfographiccover.jpg",alt:"India's Poverty Profile"})}),"
",n(a.p,{children:"Cricket, along with the other distractions mentioned above, diverts the attention of our people from these real issues. It attempts to depict non-issues like winning a cricket match as the real issue. So, the real issue before the Indian people is not how to abolish poverty, unemployment, malnutrition, etc., but whether India has beaten Pakistan in a cricket match, or whether Virat Kohli has scored a century."}),"
",n(a.p,{children:"I refuse to join in the celebrations of these trivial victories, as they divert attention from the real problems facing India. Such celebrations are an insult to the poor people in India, and I refuse to insult my people."}),"
",n(a.p,{children:"Our nation's progress lies in diversifying our sporting interests and nurturing talent across various disciplines. It's time to break free from the chains of colonial ideologies, explore other avenues, and ensure that our investments of time and energy truly enrich our lives and contribute to our nation's success."})]})}return{default:function(e={}){const{wrapper:i}=e.components||{};return i?n(i,{...e,children:n(_createMdxContent,{...e})}):_createMdxContent(e)}};

title: The Anatomy of Python 🐍
description: Discover Python's internal workings, from source code writing to CPU execution, in this comprehensive guide for developers seeking deeper insights
body:
const{Fragment:e,jsx:n,jsxs:t}=arguments[0];function _createMdxContent(i){const r={a:"a",code:"code",h2:"h2",h3:"h3",img:"img",li:"li",ol:"ol",p:"p",strong:"strong",...i.components};return t(e,{children:[n(r.p,{children:"Python was my first programming language. It is a popular object-oriented language known for its simplicity and versatility. As an interpreted language, Python executed code line by line using an interpreter, rather than compiling the entire code to machine language in one go."}),"
",n(r.p,{children:"In this article, we will explore the internal workings of Python, from writing source code to its execution. Understanding these stages helps developers appreciate the efficiency and power of Python as a programming language."}),"
",n(r.h2,{id:"basic-terms-to-know",children:n(r.a,{className:"subheading-anchor","aria-label":"Link to section",href:"#basic-terms-to-know",children:"Basic Terms to Know"})}),"
",n(r.p,{children:"Before we dive into the workings of Python, let's first understand some basic terms:"}),"
",n(r.h3,{id:"code-editor",children:n(r.a,{className:"subheading-anchor","aria-label":"Link to section",href:"#code-editor",children:n(r.strong,{children:"Code Editor"})})}),"
",n(r.p,{children:"This is the environment where the source code is written. It is the starting point of the Python program, where developers write instructions in a human-readable format."}),"
",n(r.h3,{id:"source-code",children:n(r.a,{className:"subheading-anchor","aria-label":"Link to section",href:"#source-code",children:n(r.strong,{children:"Source Code"})})}),"
",t(r.p,{children:["The human-readable instructions written in the code editor and saved as a ",n(r.code,{children:".py"})," file. This file contains the code that the Python compiler will process."]}),"
",n(r.h3,{id:"compilation-stage",children:n(r.a,{className:"subheading-anchor","aria-label":"Link to section",href:"#compilation-stage",children:n(r.strong,{children:"Compilation Stage"})})}),"
",t(r.p,{children:["In this stage, the Python compiler translates the source code into byte code, checking for syntax errors along the way. If no errors are found, a ",n(r.code,{children:".pyc"})," file containing the byte code is generated."]}),"
",n(r.h3,{id:"python-virtual-machine-pvm",children:n(r.a,{className:"subheading-anchor","aria-label":"Link to section",href:"#python-virtual-machine-pvm",children:n(r.strong,{children:"Python Virtual Machine (PVM)"})})}),"
",n(r.p,{children:"The PVM is the core runtime engine of Python. It interprets the byte code and translates it into machine code that the CPU can execute. The PVM ensures that Python code can be executed on any machine with a Python interpreter, making Python highly portable."}),"
",n(r.h3,{id:"running-program",children:n(r.a,{className:"subheading-anchor","aria-label":"Link to section",href:"#running-program",children:n(r.strong,{children:"Running Program"})})}),"
",n(r.p,{children:"Once the machine code is generated, the CPU executes it, and the program performs the tasks and computations specified by the original Python script."}),"
",n(r.h2,{id:"pythons-execution-process",children:n(r.a,{className:"subheading-anchor","aria-label":"Link to section",href:"#pythons-execution-process",children:"Python's Execution Process"})}),"
",n(r.p,{children:"Python code undergoes several stages before it is executed by the computer's CPU. Here’s a step-by-step breakdown of how Python code is converted into executable code:"}),"
",n(r.p,{children:n(r.img,{src:"https://cdn.hashnode.com/res/hashnode/image/upload/v1715955234708/e46fbbb2-e325-4197-ae40-7511d6bfebb9.png",alt:"Code Editor"})}),"
",t(r.ol,{children:["
",t(r.li,{children:["
",n(r.h3,{id:"writing-the-source-code",children:n(r.a,{className:"subheading-anchor","aria-label":"Link to section",href:"#writing-the-source-code",children:"Writing the Source Code"})}),"
",n(r.p,{children:n(r.img,{src:"https://live.staticflickr.com/4836/44661017890_eb4f288ffe_b.jpg",alt:""})}),"
",t(r.p,{children:["The first step in any Python program is writing the source code in a code editor. This is human-readable code, written according to Python’s syntax rules. Once written, this source code is saved as a ",n(r.code,{children:".py"})," file."]}),"
"]}),"
",t(r.li,{children:["
",n(r.h3,{id:"compilation-to-byte-code",children:n(r.a,{className:"subheading-anchor","aria-label":"Link to section",href:"#compilation-to-byte-code",children:"Compilation to Byte Code"})}),"
",n(r.p,{children:n(r.img,{src:"https://prepinstadotcom.s3.ap-south-1.amazonaws.com/wp-content/uploads/2020/07/Pythonbyte.webp",alt:""})}),"
",n(r.p,{children:"When the .py file is executed, the Python compiler first reads the source code. During this stage, the compiler checks for any syntax errors. If no errors are found, the compiler converts the source code into byte code, resulting in a .pyc file. Unlike machine code, byte code is not directly executable by the CPU but serves as an intermediate representation."}),"
"]}),"
",t(r.li,{children:["
",n(r.h3,{id:"interpretation-by-the-python-virtual-machine-pvm",children:n(r.a,{className:"subheading-anchor","aria-label":"Link to section",href:"#interpretation-by-the-python-virtual-machine-pvm",children:n(r.strong,{children:"Interpretation by the Python Virtual Machine (PVM)"})})}),"
",n(r.p,{children:"The byte code is then fed into the Python Virtual Machine (PVM). The PVM is an interpreter that reads the byte code and translates it into machine-executable code. This translation happens line by line, meaning that the PVM interprets and executes each line of byte code sequentially."}),"
"]}),"
",t(r.li,{children:["
",n(r.h3,{id:"execution-by-the-cpu",children:n(r.a,{className:"subheading-anchor","aria-label":"Link to section",href:"#execution-by-the-cpu",children:"Execution by the CPU"})}),"
",n(r.p,{children:"Finally, the machine code produced by the PVM is executed by the CPU. The CPU, which understands only binary code, performs the tasks and computations specified in the original Python program, producing the desired output."}),"

",n(r.h2,{id:"summary",children:n(r.a,{className:"subheading-anchor","aria-label":"Link to section",href:"#summary",children:"Summary"})}),"
",n(r.p,{children:n(r.img,{src:"https://www.devopsschool.com/blog/wp-content/uploads/2020/08/python-virtual-machine.png",alt:""})}),"
",n(r.p,{children:"Python’s internal working involves a multi-stage process where source code is compiled into byte code, interpreted by the PVM, and finally executed as machine code by the CPU."}),"
",t(r.p,{children:["To learn more, refer to ",n(r.a,{href:"https://www.geeksforgeeks.org/internal-working-of-python/",target:"_blank",rel:"nofollow",children:"https://www.geeksforgeeks.org/internal-working-of-python/"})," or watch the below YouTube video by Hitesh Chaudhary(Chai aur Code)."]}),"

title: The Honest Woodcutter 🪓
description: A satirical take on the classic fable of "The Honest Woodcutter" leading to unexpected consequences
body:
const{Fragment:e,jsx:t,jsxs:a}=arguments[0];function _createMdxContent(o){const n={p:"p",...o.components};return a(e,{children:[t(n.p,{children:"Once upon a time in a small village by the woods, there lived a woodcutter. He was hardworking with a simple daily routine. He wakes up in the afternoon, takes a shit and straight up goes to the nearby woods to chop trees. He had chopped over a million trees by now and was solely responsible for destroying the nearby forest to the verge of extinction. However, it was beneficial for the villagers. They do not have to pay a visit to the zoo to see wild animals now. All of this came at a small negligible cost of the animals sometimes eating the small children of the village."}),"
",t(n.p,{children:"One fine afternoon, as usual, the poor woodcutter was on his way deep into the jungle on his tractor to find new trees to deforest. Suddenly, his gaze caught a big thicc tree that he had never seen before. It was beside a small pond and with a signboard screaming ‘DON’T CUT’."}),"
",t(n.p,{children:"The woodcutter ignored all the bullshit and started striking the thicc tree with his axe. Suddenly, his axe slipped from his hand straight into the pond. Alas! Moaned the woodcutter. But then to his surprise all of a sudden a fairy appeared from the lake with three axes in her hand - a gold axe, a silver axe, and a bronze axe."}),"
",t(n.p,{children:"“Oh dear, Which one is yours?” the lake fairy asked the honest woodcutter. The woodcutter had read the story before and thus he told the fairy “The gold axe! That mine!”. The stupid fairy, following the old script, was impressed by his honesty and gave him all three axes."}),"
",t(n.p,{children:"The honest woodcutter thought of taking advantage of this glitch he had found in the matrix. He brought another iron axe from his nearby tractor and threw it into the lake. But this time instead of a magic fairy’s apparition, he heard a loud thud which was followed by the pond turning red. Looks like the poor woodcutter’s axe had killed the fairy."}),"
",t(n.p,{children:"Panic struck the woodcutter as he saw this murder had been witnessed by a passerby. In no time, the police arrived at the scene. After careful examination of the murder scene, the police arrested the honest woodcutter for cutting the tree despite the warning."})]})}return{default:function(e={}){const{wrapper:a}=e.components||{};return a?t(a,{...e,children:t(_createMdxContent,{...e})}):_createMdxContent(e)}};

title: The Technology Behind IPL Live Streaming
description: Discover the technology powering IPL live streaming, from capturing to delivering cricket action to your devices
body:
const{Fragment:e,jsx:t,jsxs:i}=arguments[0];function _createMdxContent(n){const r={a:"a",em:"em",h3:"h3",img:"img",p:"p",strong:"strong",...n.components};return i(e,{children:[t(r.p,{children:"The Indian Premier League (IPL) is one of the most popular cricket tournaments, watched by millions of fans. In 2024, the first 51 matches of IPL got over 510 million eyeballs glued to their screens."}),"
",t(r.p,{children:"But have you ever wondered how the live action from the Wankhede Stadium's pitch reaches your TV, smartphone, or computer? Let’s break down the process into five simple steps:"}),"
",t(r.h3,{id:"1-capturing-the-match-",children:t(r.a,{className:"subheading-anchor","aria-label":"Link to section",href:"#1-capturing-the-match-",children:t(r.strong,{children:"#1 Capturing the Match 🎥"})})}),"
",t(r.p,{children:t(r.img,{src:"https://i.ytimg.com/vi/XxeVsGjvUxQ/maxresdefault.jpg",alt:"Behind the camera - cricket photographer Gareth Copley on 100 Tests"})}),"
",t(r.p,{children:"It all starts at the cricket stadium, where multiple high-definition cameras and microphones are set up to capture every moment of the match. The cameras record the video of the players, the field, and the crowd, while the microphones pick up the sounds of the game, including commentary and the roar of the fans."}),"
",t(r.h3,{id:"2-encoding-the-content-",children:t(r.a,{className:"subheading-anchor","aria-label":"Link to section",href:"#2-encoding-the-content-",children:t(r.strong,{children:"#2 Encoding the Content 💿"})})}),"
",t(r.p,{children:t(r.img,{src:"https://st1.techlusive.in/wp-content/uploads/2023/05/IPL-Live-mixing.jpg",alt:"TATA IPL 2023: Dolby's Jayant Shah talks about IPL's Live audio tech, video  mixing process, and more"})}),"
",t(r.p,{children:"Once the video and audio are captured, they are sent to an encoder. An encoder is a device or software that takes these raw video and audio files and compresses them into a format suitable for streaming."}),"
",t(r.p,{children:t(r.em,{children:"Think of it as packing all the game footage and sounds into a neat container that can be easily sent over the Internet."})}),"
",t(r.h3,{id:"3-sending-to-the-server-️",children:t(r.a,{className:"subheading-anchor","aria-label":"Link to section",href:"#3-sending-to-the-server-️",children:t(r.strong,{children:"#3 Sending to the Server ☁️"})})}),"
",t(r.p,{children:t(r.img,{src:"https://miro.medium.com/v2/resize:fit:744/1*4ypGL-73GE9oJmYeLPGHqg.png",alt:" Live Streaming Workflow"})}),"
",t(r.p,{children:"The encoded stream is then sent to a server. A server is a powerful computer located in a data centre that can be accessed via the Internet. The server’s job is to take this single package and create multiple versions of it at different quality levels."}),"
",t(r.p,{children:"This is important because people have different internet speeds and devices. For example, someone with a fast internet connection can watch in high definition, while someone with slower internet might watch in a lower resolution."}),"
",t(r.p,{children:t(r.img,{src:"https://www.muvi.com/wp-content/uploads/2020/04/adaptive-birtate-vs-multi-bitrate-streaming.jpg",alt:"Adaptive Bitrate Vs Multi-bitrate Streaming - What's the Difference? - Muvi"})}),"
",i(r.p,{children:[t(r.strong,{children:"Adaptive Bitrate Streaming (ABR) -"})," To ensure the best viewing experience, the server uses a technology called Adaptive Bitrate Streaming (ABR). ABR automatically adjusts the quality of the video based on the viewer’s internet speed. So if your internet speed drops, the server sends a lower-quality version to prevent buffering."]}),"
",t(r.h3,{id:"4-using-a-content-delivery-network-cdn-️",children:t(r.a,{className:"subheading-anchor","aria-label":"Link to section",href:"#4-using-a-content-delivery-network-cdn-️",children:t(r.strong,{children:"#4 Using a Content Delivery Network (CDN) 🌨️"})})}),"
",t(r.p,{children:"Before the stream reaches your device, it passes through a Content Delivery Network (CDN). A CDN is a network of servers distributed around the world that helps deliver the stream quickly and efficiently."}),"
",t(r.p,{children:t(r.img,{src:"https://cloudkul.com/blog/wp-content/uploads/2020/02/Untitled-Diagram-8.jpg",alt:"A Brief Introduction to Content Delivery Network(CDN) - Cloudkul"})}),"
",t(r.p,{children:"The CDN ensures that the video reaches you with minimal delay by sending it from a server that is geographically closest to you. This reduces buffering and improves the streaming experience."}),"
",i(r.p,{children:[t(r.strong,{children:"Streaming Protocols -"})," The video stream is transferred from the server to the CDN using specific protocols. One common protocol is RTMP (Real-Time Messaging Protocol), which is known for its low latency and ability to stream high-definition video smoothly. Another popular protocol is HLS (HTTP Live Streaming), developed by Apple. HLS is widely used because it allows viewers to rewind, fast-forward, and pause the live stream, similar to how you use YouTube and Netflix."]}),"
",t(r.h3,{id:"5-delivering-to-your-device-",children:t(r.a,{className:"subheading-anchor","aria-label":"Link to section",href:"#5-delivering-to-your-device-",children:t(r.strong,{children:"#5 Delivering to Your Device 📱"})})}),"
",t(r.p,{children:t(r.img,{src:"https://m.economictimes.com/thumb/msid-100679056,width-1600,height-900,resizemode-4,imgsize-191320/ipl-tv-viewership-draws-451-million-unique-audience-as-of-week-5-21-higher-than-last-full-season.jpg",alt:"ipl playoffs 2023: Record high viewership for IPL playoffs in 2023, 44%  higher YoY - The Economic Times"})}),"
",t(r.p,{children:"Finally, the CDN sends the video stream to your device. The nearest CDN server to you will handle your request, making sure you get the stream quickly and without much delay. Your video player—whether it’s on your TV, smartphone, or computer—then decodes the stream, allowing you to watch the match live."}),"
",t(r.p,{children:"To make sure everything runs smoothly, streaming companies constantly optimize their systems. They prepare for high traffic during big matches by balancing the load across multiple servers and using efficient data routing. This way, even when millions of fans are watching at the same time, the stream remains stable and high quality."}),"
",t(r.p,{children:t(r.em,{children:"To learn more about the process of online video streaming, you may watch this video by Apna College:"})}),"
",t("iframe",{width:"560",height:"315",src:"https://www.youtube.com/embed/RXk9tndVOAg?si=GyoAAYYpLK8J2Jaj",title:"YouTube video player",frameborder:"0",allow:"accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share",referrerpolicy:"strict-origin-when-cross-origin",allowfullscreen:!0})]})}return{default:function(e={}){const{wrapper:i}=e.components||{};return i?t(i,{...e,children:t(_createMdxContent,{...e})}):_createMdxContent(e)}};

title: The Ultimate AI for Segmenting Anything, Anywhere
description: Discover META's revolutionary Segment Anything Model (SAM), an AI model capable of identifying and outlining any object in an image effortlessly
body:
const{Fragment:e,jsx:n,jsxs:i}=arguments[0];function _createMdxContent(t){const a={a:"a",br:"br",em:"em",h2:"h2",h3:"h3",img:"img",li:"li",p:"p",strong:"strong",ul:"ul",...t.components};return i(e,{children:[i(a.p,{children:["Have you ever wished for an ",n(a.a,{href:"https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Artificial_intelligence",target:"_blank",rel:"nofollow",children:"AI"})," that could identify and outline ",n(a.em,{children:"any"})," object in an image? Enter META's Segment Anything Model (",n(a.a,{href:"https://segment-anything.com/",target:"_blank",rel:"nofollow",children:"SAM"}),"). It's not just another AI tool."]}),"
",n(a.h2,{id:"what-is-sam",children:n(a.a,{className:"subheading-anchor","aria-label":"Link to section",href:"#what-is-sam",children:"What is SAM?"})}),"
",n(a.p,{children:n(a.img,{src:"https://cdn.hashnode.com/res/hashnode/image/upload/v1727703705020/b82cf2a9-da05-4b24-a100-5a9b475d86b9.png",alt:""})}),"
",n(a.p,{children:"SAM is an AI model that can segment any object in an image. But what does that mean? Imagine pointing at an object in a photo. SAM will outline it for you. It's that simple, yet incredibly powerful."}),"
",n(a.p,{children:"META introduced SAM in 2023, and since then, it has taken the AI world by storm. Its versatility, efficiency, and accuracy have made it a favourite among researchers and developers alike."}),"
",n(a.h2,{id:"how-does-sam-work",children:n(a.a,{className:"subheading-anchor","aria-label":"Link to section",href:"#how-does-sam-work",children:"How Does SAM Work?"})}),"
",n(a.p,{children:n(a.img,{src:"https://cdn.hashnode.com/res/hashnode/image/upload/v1727702554851/31f12f8d-52d6-4d44-ac7e-c1cc046be279.png",alt:""})}),"
",n(a.p,{children:"SAM uses a unique approach that combines three key elements:"}),"
",i(a.ul,{children:["
",n(a.li,{children:"A powerful image encoder"}),"
",n(a.li,{children:"A prompt encoder"}),"
",n(a.li,{children:"A lightweight mask decoder"}),"
"]}),"
",n(a.p,{children:"Here's the process in action:"}),"
",n(a.p,{children:n(a.img,{src:"https://cdn.hashnode.com/res/hashnode/image/upload/v1727704614024/1bb1eb44-6506-43e3-ac61-e97ecf1ecbdf.png",alt:""})}),"
",i(a.ul,{children:["
",n(a.li,{children:"The image encoder analyzes the entire image, creating a detailed representation."}),"
",n(a.li,{children:"You provide a prompt (like a point, box, or even text)."}),"
",n(a.li,{children:"The prompt encoder processes your input, translating it into a format SAM can use."}),"
",n(a.li,{children:"The mask decoder uses both the image representation and the encoded prompt to create a precise mask of the object."}),"
"]}),"
",n(a.p,{children:"This process happens in real-time, making SAM not just accurate, but also incredibly fast."}),"
",n(a.h2,{id:"why-is-sam-revolutionary",children:n(a.a,{className:"subheading-anchor","aria-label":"Link to section",href:"#why-is-sam-revolutionary",children:"Why is SAM Revolutionary?"})}),"
",n(a.p,{children:n(a.img,{src:"https://github.com/ultralytics/docs/releases/download/0/sa-1b-dataset-sample.avif",alt:"Dataset sample image"})}),"
",n(a.p,{children:"SAM isn't just another AI model. It's a leap forward in computer vision technology. Here's why:"}),"
",i(a.ul,{children:["
",i(a.li,{children:[n(a.strong,{children:"Versatility"}),": SAM can segment ",n(a.em,{children:"anything"}),". From cats to cars, flowers to buildings, it handles diverse objects with ease."]}),"
",i(a.li,{children:[n(a.strong,{children:"Zero-shot learning"}),": Unlike traditional models, SAM doesn't need specific training for new objects. It can segment objects it has never seen before."]}),"
",i(a.li,{children:[n(a.strong,{children:"Interactivity"}),": You guide SAM with simple prompts. Point, draw a box, or even describe the object in text. This flexibility makes it user-friendly and adaptable."]}),"
",i(a.li,{children:[n(a.strong,{children:"Speed"}),": SAM works in real-time. No lag, no waiting. This makes it perfect for applications that need quick responses."]}),"
",i(a.li,{children:[n(a.strong,{children:"Accuracy"}),": Its segmentations are precise and reliable, even in complex scenes."]}),"
"]}),"
",n(a.p,{children:"These features open up a world of possibilities. From image editing to autonomous vehicles, medical imaging to augmented reality, SAM's potential applications are vast and diverse."}),"
",n(a.h2,{id:"technical-deep-dive",children:n(a.a,{className:"subheading-anchor","aria-label":"Link to section",href:"#technical-deep-dive",children:"Technical Deep Dive"})}),"
",n(a.p,{children:"Let's take a closer look. SAM's design is a wonder of AI engineering, using several advanced techniques."}),"
",n(a.h3,{id:"the-image-encoder",children:n(a.a,{className:"subheading-anchor","aria-label":"Link to section",href:"#the-image-encoder",children:"The Image Encoder"})}),"
",n(a.p,{children:n(a.img,{src:"https://cdn.hashnode.com/res/hashnode/image/upload/v1727704747227/3ef49e70-39d5-4849-a90e-6edb9e78721e.gif",alt:"Source: Wikipedia"})}),"
",i(a.p,{children:["SAM uses a ",n(a.a,{href:"https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Vision_transformer",target:"_blank",rel:"nofollow",children:"Vision Transformer"})," (ViT) as its backbone. This encoder:"]}),"
",i(a.ul,{children:["
",n(a.li,{children:"Splits the image into patches"}),"
",n(a.li,{children:"Processes each patch independently"}),"
",n(a.li,{children:"Combines the results for a global view"}),"
"]}),"
",n(a.p,{children:"The result is a rich, detailed representation of the entire image. This approach allows SAM to capture both fine details and broader context, crucial for accurate segmentation."}),"
",n(a.h3,{id:"the-prompt-encoder",children:n(a.a,{className:"subheading-anchor","aria-label":"Link to section",href:"#the-prompt-encoder",children:"The Prompt Encoder"})}),"
",n(a.p,{children:"One of SAM's unique features is its ability to handle various types of prompts:"}),"
",i(a.ul,{children:["
",n(a.li,{children:"Points"}),"
",n(a.li,{children:"Boxes"}),"
",n(a.li,{children:"Masks"}),"
",n(a.li,{children:"Text"}),"
"]}),"
",n(a.p,{children:"Each type of prompt has its own encoding process. The encoder translates your input into a format SAM can use, allowing for flexible and intuitive interactions."}),"
",n(a.h3,{id:"the-mask-decoder",children:n(a.a,{className:"subheading-anchor","aria-label":"Link to section",href:"#the-mask-decoder",children:"The Mask Decoder"})}),"
",n(a.p,{children:"This is where the magic happens. The decoder:"}),"
",i(a.ul,{children:["
",n(a.li,{children:"Takes the image representation"}),"
",n(a.li,{children:"Combines it with the prompt encoding"}),"
",n(a.li,{children:"Generates a binary mask"}),"
"]}),"
",n(a.p,{children:"It uses a series of transformer layers to refine the mask prediction iteratively. This process allows SAM to produce highly accurate segmentations, even for complex or partially obscured objects."}),"
",n(a.h2,{id:"sam-in-action-real-world-applications",children:n(a.a,{className:"subheading-anchor","aria-label":"Link to section",href:"#sam-in-action-real-world-applications",children:"SAM in Action: Real-World Applications"})}),"
",n(a.p,{children:n(a.img,{src:"https://cdn.hashnode.com/res/hashnode/image/upload/v1727703470609/2427fabb-26b7-4521-9730-1a8986013e9a.png",alt:""})}),"
",n(a.p,{children:"SAM isn't just a lab experiment. It's making waves in various fields:"}),"
",i(a.ul,{children:["
",i(a.li,{children:[n(a.strong,{children:"Image Editing"}),": Photoshop professionals can use SAM for precise object selection, streamlining their workflow."]}),"
",i(a.li,{children:[n(a.strong,{children:"Medical Imaging"}),": SAM can help identify tumours or anomalies in scans, potentially improving diagnostic accuracy."]}),"
",i(a.li,{children:[n(a.strong,{children:"Autonomous Vehicles"}),": By detecting and segmenting road elements, SAM can enhance the perception systems of self-driving cars."]}),"
",i(a.li,{children:[n(a.strong,{children:"Augmented Reality"}),": SAM's ability to segment objects in real time makes it ideal for seamlessly blending virtual objects with the real world."]}),"
",i(a.li,{children:[n(a.strong,{children:"Robotics"}),": SAM can help robots identify and interact with objects in their environment, improving their ability to navigate and manipulate the world around them."]}),"
",i(a.li,{children:[n(a.strong,{children:"Content Moderation"}),": Social media platforms can use SAM to automatically detect and flag inappropriate content in images."]}),"
",i(a.li,{children:[n(a.strong,{children:"Environmental Monitoring"}),": SAM can assist in analyzing satellite imagery to track deforestation, urban development, or changes in wildlife habitats."]}),"
"]}),"
",n(a.p,{children:"The possibilities are endless. As developers integrate SAM into their workflows, we'll likely see even more innovative uses emerge."}),"
",n(a.h2,{id:"challenges-and-limitations",children:n(a.a,{className:"subheading-anchor","aria-label":"Link to section",href:"#challenges-and-limitations",children:"Challenges and Limitations"})}),"
",n(a.p,{children:n(a.img,{src:"https://github.com/facebookresearch/segment-anything-2/raw/main/assets/sa_v_dataset.jpg?raw=true",alt:"SA-V dataset"})}),"
",n(a.p,{children:"Despite its power, SAM isn't perfect. It faces some challenges:"}),"
",i(a.ul,{children:["
",i(a.li,{children:[n(a.strong,{children:"Computational Demand"}),": SAM requires ",n(a.a,{href:"https://www.hyperstack.cloud/technical-resources/tutorials/getting-started-with-sam-2-a-comprehensive-guide-to-metas-latest-model-for-videos-and-images#:~:text=SAM2%20GPU%20requirements%20could%20be,without%20investing%20in%20expensive%20hardware.",target:"_blank",rel:"nofollow",children:"significant"})," processing power, which can be a limitation for some applications."]}),"
",i(a.li,{children:[n(a.strong,{children:"Edge Cases"}),": Highly complex or unusual scenes can sometimes trip up the model."]}),"
",i(a.li,{children:[n(a.strong,{children:"Ambiguity"}),': In some cases, what constitutes an "object" isn't clear, leading to potential inconsistencies in segmentation.']}),"
",i(a.li,{children:[n(a.strong,{children:"Fine Details"}),": While generally accurate, SAM might miss extremely fine details in some instances."]}),"
",i(a.li,{children:[n(a.strong,{children:"Context Understanding"}),": SAM excels at segmentation but doesn't inherently understand the context or meaning of the objects it segments."]}),"
"]}),"
",n(a.p,{children:"Researchers are actively working on these issues. Each update brings improvements and refinements, pushing the boundaries of what's possible in computer vision."}),"
",n(a.h2,{id:"the-future-of-sam",children:n(a.a,{className:"subheading-anchor","aria-label":"Link to section",href:"#the-future-of-sam",children:"The Future of SAM"})}),"
",n(a.p,{children:n(a.img,{src:"https://cdn.hashnode.com/res/hashnode/image/upload/v1727705968656/a8295fc3-2ebc-4693-98b9-a714d5d9dc9d.png",alt:""})}),"
",n(a.p,{children:"What's next for SAM?"}),"
",i(a.ul,{children:["
",i(a.li,{children:[n(a.strong,{children:"Integration with Other AI Models"}),": Combining SAM with language models could lead to more intuitive, conversation-like interactions for image segmentation."]}),"
",i(a.li,{children:[n(a.strong,{children:"Improved Efficiency"}),": Researchers are working on making SAM faster and less resource-intensive, potentially allowing it to run on mobile devices."]}),"
",i(a.li,{children:[n(a.strong,{children:"3D Segmentation"}),": Extending SAM's capabilities to three-dimensional data could revolutionize fields like medical imaging and 3D modelling."]}),"
",i(a.li,{children:[n(a.strong,{children:"Real-time Video Segmentation"}),": Applying SAM's power to moving images could enhance video editing, surveillance, and motion capture technologies."]}),"
",i(a.li,{children:[n(a.strong,{children:"Customization"}),": Allowing fine-tuning for specific domains or tasks could make SAM even more versatile and accurate in specialized applications."]}),"
",i(a.li,{children:[n(a.strong,{children:"Multi-modal Learning"}),": Incorporating other types of data, like audio or sensor readings, could lead to more robust and context-aware segmentation."]}),"
"]}),"
",n(a.h2,{id:"getting-started-with-sam",children:n(a.a,{className:"subheading-anchor","aria-label":"Link to section",href:"#getting-started-with-sam",children:"Getting Started with SAM"})}),"
",n(a.p,{children:"Ready to try SAM? Here's how you can get started:"}),"
",i(a.ul,{children:["
",i(a.li,{children:[n(a.strong,{children:"Official Repository"}),": Check out META's ",n(a.a,{href:"https://github.com/facebookresearch/segment-anything",target:"_blank",rel:"nofollow",children:"GitHub"})," for code and documentation. This is your starting point for understanding SAM's architecture and implementation."]}),"
",i(a.li,{children:[n(a.strong,{children:"Pre-trained Models"}),": ",n(a.a,{href:"https://docs.ultralytics.com/models/sam/",target:"_blank",rel:"nofollow",children:"Download"})," and use ",n(a.a,{href:"https://sam2.metademolab.com/demo",target:"_blank",rel:"nofollow",children:"pre-trained"})," SAM models. These are great for getting up and running quickly or for use in transfer learning."]}),"
",i(a.li,{children:[n(a.strong,{children:"API Integration"}),": Various AI ",n(a.a,{href:"https://www.segmind.com/models/sam-img2img",target:"_blank",rel:"nofollow",children:"platforms"})," and APIs offer SAM integration, making it easier to incorporate into existing projects."]}),"
",i(a.li,{children:[n(a.strong,{children:"Custom Training"}),": For advanced users, ",n(a.a,{href:"https://www.labellerr.com/blog/fine-tuning-sam/",target:"_blank",rel:"nofollow",children:"fine-tuning SAM"})," for specific tasks can yield even better results in specialized domains."]}),"
",i(a.li,{children:[n(a.strong,{children:"Community Resources"}),": Join forums and ",n(a.a,{href:"https://www.reddit.com/r/MachineLearning/",target:"_blank",rel:"nofollow",children:"community"})," groups to share experiences, get help, and stay updated on the latest developments."]}),"
"]}),"
",n(a.h3,{id:"powering-sam-with-decentralized-computing",children:n(a.a,{className:"subheading-anchor","aria-label":"Link to section",href:"#powering-sam-with-decentralized-computing",children:"Powering SAM with Decentralized Computing"})}),"
",i(a.p,{children:["Running advanced AI models like SAM often requires substantial computational resources. This is where ",n(a.a,{href:"https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Decentralization",target:"_blank",rel:"nofollow",children:"decentralized"})," computing solutions come into play. title: Year End Review: 2023 📅
description: Reflecting on personal growth, experiences, and challenges of 2023, and writing my goals for 2024 in this Year End Review
body:
const{Fragment:e,jsx:t,jsxs:a}=arguments[0];function _createMdxContent(n){const r={a:"a",br:"br",h2:"h2",img:"img",p:"p",strong:"strong",...n.components};return a(e,{children:[t(r.h2,{id:"foreword",children:t(r.a,{className:"subheading-anchor","aria-label":"Link to section",href:"#foreword",children:"Foreword"})}),"
",t(r.p,{children:"First of all, I am not too fond of celebrating the new year. For a Virat Hindu (pun intended) like me, my new year is on the first day of Chaitra. But I do get invited to a New Year's Eve celebration every year and I take it gracefully."}),"
",t(r.p,{children:"As I am a person with a very short memory retention power, it is quintessential to write down how my year went or else I will forget it just like I have forgotten the previous twenty or so."}),"
",t(r.p,{children:t(r.img,{src:"https://blog-eight-hazel-65.vercel.app/Images/blog/pxfuel.png",alt:""})}),"
",t(r.p,{children:"The process of forgetting has already begun so this blog does not represent everything that has happened to me this year, it only has the things that I still remember."}),"
",t(r.p,{children:"So here I go, writing about what I went through this year, the lessons I learned, the Ws I snatched, the Ls I took, the changes I saw in myself in these 365 days, and finally what I want my 2024 to be like!"}),"
",t(r.h2,{id:"the-experiences--the-lessons-learned",children:t(r.a,{className:"subheading-anchor","aria-label":"Link to section",href:"#the-experiences--the-lessons-learned",children:t(r.strong,{children:"The experiences & the lessons learned:"})})}),"
",t(r.p,{children:t(r.img,{src:"https://blog-eight-hazel-65.vercel.app/Images/blog/ncc-nameplate.jpeg",alt:""})}),"
",t(r.p,{children:t(r.img,{src:"https://blog-eight-hazel-65.vercel.app/Images/blog/train.jpg",alt:"Sealdah Station"})}),"
",t(r.p,{children:"The best experience I’ve had this year was at NCC. I simply belong there. It provides me with a platform to meet some amazing people, fly planes, fire weapons, and serve the nation. Every time I step into that parade ground, I’m carrying a legacy with me."}),"
",t(r.p,{children:"The freshest experience I had this year was college. It took me 20 years to get there but honestly, it's worth it solely because of the freedom of self-improvement that I get there. After, three years of grinding, I can safely say it's worth it."}),"
",t(r.p,{children:"My first solo trip to Kolkata and my second solo trip to Prayagraj were such a refreshing experience as well. I was so overwhelmed with joy the moment Sealdah Rajdhani took off from NDLS."}),"
",t(r.p,{children:t(r.img,{src:"https://blog-eight-hazel-65.vercel.app/Images/blog/sealdah-station.jpg",alt:""})}),"
",t(r.p,{children:t(r.img,{src:"https://blog-eight-hazel-65.vercel.app/Images/blog/victoria-memorial.jpg",alt:""})}),"
",t(r.p,{children:t(r.img,{src:"https://blog-eight-hazel-65.vercel.app/Images/blog/kolkata-bus.jpg",alt:"Victoria Memorial"})}),"
",t(r.p,{children:"Standing at this railway station, a thousand miles away from home with the task of finding food, shelter, and a companion for myself. I learned to survive alone and make friends impromptu."}),"
",t(r.h2,{id:"the-goodies",children:t(r.a,{className:"subheading-anchor","aria-label":"Link to section",href:"#the-goodies",children:t(r.strong,{children:"The Goodies"})})}),"
",t(r.p,{children:"I got a chance to visit Bihar after six years. That place is my motherland and every time I go there I come back motivated to do great in life so I don’t have to go back there."}),"
",t(r.p,{children:"I started to grow an online presence. It will take a lot of time and effort but I’m glad I’ve finally started using the internet for a good cause. I got rid of my Reddit/ib use as well."}),"
",t(r.p,{children:"I got my first phone gifted by my sister, my first TWS which I bought with my own money. It feels great buying books, snacks, accessories heck even a toffee when it's your money."}),"
",t(r.p,{children:"Getting my first internship was a great thing that happened this year. It taught me why not to do internships and stick to freelancing."}),"
",t(r.p,{children:"I got the chance to attend numerous events and all of them were amazing. Met new people, learned new things, and ate some amazing food. Also, I experienced a 5-star hotel."}),"
",t(r.p,{children:t(r.img,{src:"https://blog-eight-hazel-65.vercel.app/Images/blog/Screenshot_20230212_030327.png",alt:""})}),"
",t(r.p,{children:t(r.img,{src:"https://blog-eight-hazel-65.vercel.app/Images/blog/Screenshot_20230411_151521.png",alt:""})}),"
",t(r.p,{children:"I started my liberation process; and created a personal site and a blog. I stuck to using free software and Linux."}),"
",t(r.h2,{id:"my-failures",children:t(r.a,{className:"subheading-anchor","aria-label":"Link to section",href:"#my-failures",children:t(r.strong,{children:"My Failures"})})}),"
",t(r.p,{children:"I failed JEE for the 3rd and 4th time. This was when I had given my 100% to the preparation. I’m just not made for meme exams I reckon. I failed to retain academic knowledge. It’s like I remember nothing after an exam is over and the next time I have to start from the basics."}),"
",t(r.p,{children:"I missed all the opportunities to meet my old and true school friends. It’s been 1.5 years and I miss all of them a lot."}),"
",t(r.p,{children:"I failed to make it past the screening stage in two SSB interviews. The second time had me in tears. With no more attempts left, I have plenty of time to prepare before facing anymore."}),"
",t(r.h2,{id:"relationships",children:t(r.a,{className:"subheading-anchor","aria-label":"Link to section",href:"#relationships",children:t(r.strong,{children:"Relationships"})})}),"
",t(r.p,{children:t(r.img,{src:"https://blog-eight-hazel-65.vercel.app/Images/blog/parrot1.jpg",alt:""})}),"
",t(r.p,{children:t(r.img,{src:"https://blog-eight-hazel-65.vercel.app/Images/blog/parrot2.jpg",alt:""})}),"
",t(r.p,{children:t(r.img,{src:"https://blog-eight-hazel-65.vercel.app/Images/blog/parrot3.jpg",alt:""})}),"
",t(r.p,{children:"I lost my greatest companion, my truest love, LMAO. I cried a lot when he left us. I hope wherever he is, he is happy and free. I miss him a lot."}),"
",t(r.p,{children:"I’d say, the relation-building has been satisfying. From zero friends made last year to three this year, I’d say this is good progress. I made goal buddies and meaningful acquaintances as well."}),"
",t(r.p,{children:"Even for family relationships, it has been better. I talked with my uncles and older elders. The only bad thing is that I don’t have the privilege of my sister’s in-person company anymore."}),"
",t(r.h2,{id:"how-does-1-jan-2023-ayush-compare-to-1-jan-2024-ayush",children:t(r.a,{className:"subheading-anchor","aria-label":"Link to section",href:"#how-does-1-jan-2023-ayush-compare-to-1-jan-2024-ayush",children:t(r.strong,{children:"How does 1 Jan 2023 Ayush compare to 1 Jan 2024 Ayush?"})})}),"
",t(r.p,{children:"The most noticeable change is my looks. I lost more weight and transformed from a hairy bear to a short-haired, clean-shaven human being. I’d like to keep this look. I care a lot less about what other people think about me now and that comes with being more bad-mouth with people."}),"
",t(r.p,{children:t(r.img,{src:"https://blog-eight-hazel-65.vercel.app/Images/blog/2ggu6ki638f41.jpg",alt:""})}),"
",t(r.h2,{id:"2024",children:t(r.a,{className:"subheading-anchor","aria-label":"Link to section",href:"#2024",children:"2024?"})}),"
",t(r.p,{children:"I want to start investing. My money has been rotting in the bank for so long but no more. I will learn more about growing money and track my finances as well."}),"
",t(r.p,{children:"I want to run a marathon and attend as many camps as I can (if I don’t get kicked from NCC lol). Also, I want to stop this anxiety-shivering. I want to buy a laptop, sticker bomb it with hundreds of stickers, and make a home server out of the Raspberry Pi 3."}),"
",t(r.h2,{id:"afterword",children:t(r.a,{className:"subheading-anchor","aria-label":"Link to section",href:"#afterword",children:t(r.strong,{children:"Afterword"})})}),"
",t(r.p,{children:"I believe that neither the journey nor the destination matters. The only thing that matters is the people with whom you were during that journey. I’m grateful to everyone who invested even a blink of their time in me. It means a lot."}),"
",t(r.p,{children:t(r.img,{src:"https://blog-eight-hazel-65.vercel.app/Images/blog/pepe-hug.png",alt:""})}),"
",a(r.p,{children:["Thanks for Reading!",t(r.br,{}),"
","Have a Nice Day :)"]})]})}return{default:function(e={}){const{wrapper:a}=e.components||{};return a?t(a,{...e,children:t(_createMdxContent,{...e})}):_createMdxContent(e)}};
